violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above flour in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
A dead rodent was observed on the floor in the back corner of the storage area. Dead rodents or pests must be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The garage door to the outside, located in the back corner, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The floor in the back of the storage area was observed cracking. Floor to be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The floors in the back corner of the facility has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the electrical room, the door to the outside near the loading docks, and the door of loading dock #2 is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The floors throughout the perimeter of the facilities have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The internal perimeter between the floor and wall junctures were in poor repair (holes/gaps between floor and wall observed). PIC instructed to seal these gaps. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
